title: ALGM Earnings Calendar and Consensus Estimates
text: Zacks provides comprehensive earnings data for Allegro MicroSystems including consensus EPS estimates, revenue forecasts, and historical surprise data. The platform tracks analyst consensus for upcoming quarters and full-year results. Historical data shows ALGM's track record of meeting or beating consensus estimates in recent quarters. The Zacks Rank system rates stocks based on multiple factors including earnings estimate revisions. ALGM has been assigned various ranks reflecting changing analyst sentiment over time. Earnings surprises are quantified showing percentage differences between actual and expected results. Forward guidance provided by management is tracked alongside analyst consensus to identify convergence or divergence. Analyst revision trends show increasing or decreasing confidence in future earnings potential. The platform provides comparison to industry peers and S&P 500 benchmarks. Revenue growth rates, margin trends, and earnings per share progression are tracked historically and projected forward.
